post.previewText: If your project don't have a design system it is probably usual problem for you, when even a small changes like changes a color for action buttons takes off a lot of time, generate a lot of changes and make user interface look inconsistent. To solve the problems, you should start use a design system. Let's talk what is it and how to use.
post.title: Design system guide
